title: Negative fixture: cert declares FAIL due to empty evidence list (EMPTY_EVIDENCE)
_fixture_purpose: FAIL fixture: cert is malformed because evidence list is empty. V5 fires EMPTY_EVIDENCE. Demonstrates that bare assertions without supporting evidence are rejected — the bridge requires actual experimental data, not just a verdict claim.

observation.summary: Some experiment ran and produced a result.

parent_cert.claim: state_space orbit structure reflects genuine dynamical structure

validation_checks.description: observation.source is a known source type
verdict is one of {CONSISTENT, CONTRADICTS, PARTIAL, INCONCLUSIVE}

validation_checks.details: evidence=[] — no supporting evidence provided; cert rejected

fail_ledger.details: evidence list is empty; bare verdict assertions without supporting data are not certifiable
